Id1.text: Abdul Taib Mahmud was born in Sarawak and is part of the Parti Pesaka Bumiputera Bersatu.

Id2.text: Abdul Taib Mahmud was born in the Kingdom of Sarawak and his party is the Parti Pesaka Bumiputera Bersatu.

Id3.text: Abdul Taib Mahmud, who was born in Sarawak, belongs to the Parti Pesaka Bumiputera Bersatu.
